---
title: "Travels and adventures of the Rev. Joseph Wolff, D.D., LL.D., Vicar of Ile Brewers, near Taunton, and late missionary to the Jews and Muhammadans in Persia, Bokhara, Cashmeer, etc. "
---

## Travels and adventures of the Rev. Joseph Wolff, D.D., LL.D., Vicar of Ile Brewers, near Taunton, and late missionary to the Jews and Muhammadans in Persia, Bokhara, Cashmeer, etc. 

**Author:** The Rev. Joseph Wolff
**Date:** 1860-1861
**Imprint:** London: Saunders and Otley

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
